entries.summary: Training notebook fixed: all 3 datasets work (Quran 62K, Code 15K, Conversation 15K). Model on GPU float16. Training speed issue under investigation.
entries.details: Notebook at P:\aura-book\backend\training\deepseek_coder_arabic.ipynb. Model: deepseek-ai/deepseek-coder-6.7b-instruct on cuda:0 float16, 4.15GB. Training slow (~100 examples in 13 min). Data loading is fast (0.0s/batch). Need to check Unsloth version and training output.

entries.summary: Fixed _VerifySerializer bug: duplicate username/password fields made them required, breaking Google OAuth. Added Django password validation for non-Google registrations.
entries.details: agent_app/views.py: _VerifySerializer had username/password defined twice - second definition overwrote first with required=True. Google OAuth verify_view needs optional username/password. Fixed by removing duplicates, keeping required=False. Added validate_password() for non-Google flow.
entries.code:
class _VerifySerializer(serializers.Serializer):
    email = serializers.EmailField()
    code = serializers.CharField(max_length=6)
    username = serializers.CharField(max_length=150, required=False, allow_blank=True)
    password = serializers.CharField(max_length=128, required=False, allow_blank=True)
decisions: username/password must be optional for Google OAuth
Password validation moved to view level for non-Google flow
Auth flow: register → verify → JWT tokens → me endpoint
